qualificationResult.description: The supplier's gate results and decision so a downstream ASL entry or audit can cite the qualification structurally.
qualificationResult.schema: { supplier: string, paydex: int, financialsYears: int, qmsCert: string, segment: string, scorecard: number, decision: string }

criteria.criterion: PASS if the D&B PAYDEX score is verified as ≥70 using a report dated within 90 days of the review, and a sub-70 score triggers Financial Watch / the exception process. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when the gate is misstated or a sub-70 supplier is passed silently.

criteria.criterion: PASS if ≥3 years of audited financials are present with no going-concern qualification in the most recent audit opinion. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when the financial evidence is short or a going-concern flag is ignored.

criteria.criterion: PASS if QMS certification matches the segment: IATF 16949 for automotive-destined product (a standalone ISO 9001 is explicitly insufficient), ISO 9001 for non-automotive. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when the wrong certification standard is accepted for the segment.

criteria.criterion: PASS if a contract manufacturer performing workmanship-critical operations holds IPC-A-610 Class 2 compliance with inspector certification evidence. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when workmanship class is unaddressed for an assembly supplier.

criteria.criterion: PASS if each certificate is confirmed to cover the actual manufacturing/service site(s) supplying Stonefield, not a different corporate site. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when site scope is not verified.

criteria.criterion: PASS if the technical Qualification Package (ELEC-SCM-01) contents required by the SOP are present. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when required package elements are missing.

criteria.criterion: PASS if the on-site/desk audit per Section 3 is documented and every finding carries a corrective-action disposition. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when findings are listed without closure.

criteria.criterion: PASS if the supplier scorecard is computed using the SOP's defined weighting methodology, not an ad-hoc score. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when the scorecard weights are wrong or unstated.

criteria.criterion: PASS if any below-threshold result is routed through the Section 5 exception/waiver process with the correct approval authority, rather than waived informally. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if the overall qualification decision (approve / conditional / reject) and ASL status/re-audit frequency follow from the gate and scorecard results. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when the decision contradicts the evidence.

criteria.criterion: PASS if the report cites the Supplier Qualification SOP (SUM-SCM-SOP-002) as the source of the qualification criteria and hard gates. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if the report references the Supplier Quality Management System Manual (SUM-SCM-MAN-001) as the overarching framework. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if the PAYDEX ≥70 and other threshold values are attributed to the Stonefield Threshold Registry (SUM-REG-THR-001). FAIL otherwise.
PASS if product-reliability qualification elements reference the Reliability Qualification Protocol (SUM-REL-QUAL-003) where in scope. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when reliability claims are made with no protocol reference.

criteria.criterion: PASS if the D&B report, QMS certificates, and audit report the decision rests on are cited as retrieved artifacts. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when the gate results are asserted with no source documents.

criteria.criterion: PASS if every regulatory clause, standard, SOP, procedure, and controlled-document identifier cited in the output appears in the retrieved sources. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when any citation is invented or cannot be traced.

criteria.criterion: PASS if every measurement, margin, count, score, and figure in the output traces to the retrieved data, tables, or tool results. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when any number is unsupported.

criteria.criterion: PASS if the output contains every section the governing procedure requires for a supplier qualification report. FAIL otherwise.
criteria.explanation: Fails when a required section is missing or empty.

criteria.criterion: PASS if every factual claim in the output is supported by the retrieved sources and the exact data provided. FAIL otherwise.
PASS if the output is written clearly and unambiguously, appropriate for a controlled quality record, with correct document and revision identifiers. FAIL otherwise.

trajectory.description: Provenance checks against the recorded retrieval trajectory for a supplier qualification report.

required.reason: The qualification hard gates (PAYDEX ≥70, certified QMS) are defined in SUM-SCM-SOP-002; a qualification produced without it has no governed criteria.
SUM-SCM-MAN-001 is the overarching supplier-quality framework the SOP operates under; the qualification must be grounded in it.
